allow: PowerShell($tools = 'git','cmake','ninja','python','java','adb','qmake','gcc','g++','clang','cl','flutter','node','pip'; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$t => $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$t => 未安装/不在PATH" } })

PowerShell($paths = 'C:\\Qt','D:\\Qt','E:\\Qt','C:\\Program Files\\CMake','C:\\Android','C:\\Users\\huangcan\\AppData\\Local\\Android','C:\\Program Files\\Android','C:\\Program Files\\Java','C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio'; foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "存在: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name | ForEach-Object { "    $_" } } })
PowerShell($v = & python --version 2>$null; Write-Output "python: $v"; Get-ChildItem 'D:\\software' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($adb="D:\\software\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $svc="com.quizhelper.dumptool/com.quizhelper.dumptool.DumpAccessibilityService"; & $adb shell settings put secure accessibility_enabled 0; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; & $adb shell settings put secure enabled_accessibility_services $svc; & $adb shell settings put secure accessibility_enabled 1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; "=== 服务进程 ==="; & $adb shell "ps -A | grep quizhelper"; "=== 无障碍启用值 ==="; & $adb shell "settings get secure enabled_accessibility_services")

PowerShell($adb="D:\\software\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 564e42ec shell appops set com.quizhelper.dumptool SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW allow; if\($?\){ "overlay permission granted" }; & $adb -s 564e42ec shell dumpsys package com.quizhelper.dumptool | Select-String "SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW")
